raw_text:
CloudDynamics Inc.

Empowering engineering teams with next-generation developer platforms

Now Hiring: Director of Platform Engineering

San Francisco, CA (Remote-first with quarterly on-sites) · Full-time · $280,000 - $420,000 USD + equity + benefits

W

e are seeking an experienced Director of Platform Engineering to lead our platform engineering division

and shape the strategic direction of our internal developer platform product offerings. In this role, you will

oversee a team of 15-20 engineers across multiple squads, define platform architecture standards, and drive

organizational initiatives that impact our product roadmap and customer success. You will report directly to the VP

of Engineering and collaborate with product, sales, and customer success to ensure our platform solutions meet
evolving market needs.

A B O U T U S

CloudDynamics Inc. is a Series B infrastructure-focused SaaS company dedicated to building best-in-class internal

developer platforms (IDPs) that eliminate friction and accelerate time-to-market for engineering organizations. We

work with fast-growing tech companies to design, deploy, and manage standardized platform infrastructure that

scales across hundreds of engineering teams.

Y O U R R O L E

Lead and mentor a distributed team of senior and staff engineers, establishing clear career paths, conducting
performance reviews, and fostering a culture of technical excellence and ownership

Define and drive the multi-year technical vision for our internal developer platform, including architecture

decisions around Kubernetes orchestration, GitOps workflows, and Terraform-based infrastructure-as-code

standardization

Partner with VP of Product to shape the platform roadmap, aligning customer pain points with engineering
capabilities and ensuring platform decisions support business strategy

Architect scalable solutions using Go and Python microservices, Backstage for developer portal

standardization, and Kubernetes for multi-tenant platform isolation and resource management

Establish platform engineering best practices, standards, and governance across teams, including Terraform

module libraries, deployment automation, and observability strategies

Drive cross-functional initiatives including customer success programs, beta features with strategic accounts,

and competitive analysis to position CloudDynamics as the market leader

Represent engineering in executive leadership meetings, provide data-driven insights on platform performance

metrics, and advocate for technical investments that balance innovation with operational stability

 Build and maintain relationships with key customers, conduct technical deep-dives, and incorporate feedback

into product strategy and engineering priorities

Oversee hiring, retention, and growth of the platform engineering organization, including identifying skill gaps
and cultivating a talent pipeline for leadership roles

R E Q U I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

10+ years of software engineering experience with at least 5+ years in platform engineering, infrastructure, or

developer tooling roles

3+ years of direct management experience, including managing other managers or leading distributed

engineering teams

Deep hands-on expertise with Kubernetes, container orchestration, and managing production systems at scale

Proven experience architecting and maintaining large-scale internal developer platforms or similar

infrastructure automation systems

Strong proficiency in Infrastructure-as-Code tools (Terraform, Pulumi, or CloudFormation) and GitOps

methodologies

Experience designing and building services in Go, Python, or similar systems programming languages

Demonstrated ability to balance strategic thinking with hands-on technical contributions, and communicate

complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders

D E S I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

Hands-on experience with Backstage or similar developer portal/platform abstraction layers

Experience building or operating developer self-service platforms that improve developer experience metrics

(deployment time, error rates, etc.)

Background in observability, monitoring, and logging infrastructure (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, or

similar)

Track record of scaling engineering organizations and successfully onboarding new leaders

SaaS or venture-backed startup experience

T O O L S  O F  T H E T R A D E

Kubernetes, Terraform, Go, Python, Backstage, ArgoCD, Prometheus, Grafana, Docker, PostgreSQL

W E O F F E R

Competitive salary and equity package with clear vesting and refresh cycles

Comprehensive health coverage (medical, dental, vision) with 90% employer premium coverage

Unlimited PTO with minimum 20 days encouraged, plus 10 company holidays and sabbatical program

 Professional development budget ($10,000 annually) for conferences, courses, and training

Remote-first culture with quarterly in-person team building and office access in SF, NYC, and Austin

Parental leave (16 weeks primary / 12 weeks secondary), family planning support, and fertility benefits

Mental health support including counseling services, meditation apps, and wellness stipend

Stock options with founder-friendly terms and transparent cap table access

T O A P P LY

Interested candidates should submit their resume, cover letter, and a brief portfolio or GitHub profile (if

applicable) to careers@clouddynamics.io with the subject line 'Director of Platform Engineering Application.' We

review applications on a rolling basis. Candidates who are a fit will be contacted within 5 business days for an
initial screening call with our Talent team. The interview process includes technical deep-dive sessions with

current team leads, strategy discussion with VP of Engineering, and founder conversation.
job_title: Empowering engineering teams with next-generation developer platforms
